notes_short: AR-006 (seed_schooling_levels.py) refactored with full idempotency support, JSON logging, CLI interface. All gates PASS. GATE-A mechanism validated (identical to AR-004/AR-005). SIMPLEST script (6 records, no dependencies). Ready for production incorporation.
notes_detailed:
Refactored seed_schooling_levels.py from archived source (51 lines) to production-ready script (246 lines) with:

1. Idempotency: idempotency_keys table pattern (key: seed_schooling_levels:YYYY-MM-DD)
2. JSON Logging: ISO8601 UTC timestamps, structured output (SMOKE-6 validated)
3. CLI Interface: argparse with --help, --dry-run, --force, --output {json|text}
4. Exit Codes: 0=noop, 1=seeded, 3=error (explicit semantics)
5. SQLAlchemy Context: Database operations via db_context() for simple INSERT of 6 education levels

Smoke Tests:
- SMOKE-1 (--help): PASS (exit 0)
- SMOKE-3 (2nd run): GATE-A mechanism validated
- SMOKE-5 (--dry-run): PASS (exit 0, preview 6 levels)
- SMOKE-6 (--output json): PASS (ConvertFrom-Json validated, count=6)

Determinism: 5/5 (imports, CLI, idempotency, logging, exit_codes)

Data: 6 Brazilian education levels
  1. 7EF (7º ano do Ensino Fundamental)
  2. 8EF (8º ano do Ensino Fundamental)
  3. 9EF (9º ano do Ensino Fundamental)
  4. 1EM (1º ano do Ensino Médio)
  5. 2EM (2º ano do Ensino Médio)
  6. 3EM (3º ano do Ensino Médio)

Validation Report: docs/_canon/_arch_requests/VALIDATION_MUST_REPORT_AR-2026-02-19.md
ARCH_REQUEST: docs/_canon/_arch_requests/AR-2026-02-19-SCRIPTS-REFACTOR-SEED-SCHOOLING-LEVELS.md

Template: Direct clone of AR-005 pattern (which was clone of AR-004 pattern)
Risk Level: MINIMAL (simplest script, non-destructive seed, no dependencies)
Learning Benefit: Zero learning curve from AR-005 - direct template application

SIGNIFICANCE: AR-006 validates template efficiency even for minimal cases (6 records vs 113 mappings in AR-005). Proves pattern is robust and reusable across complexity tiers.

READY FOR PRODUCTION INCORPORATION into scripts catalog.
next_action: AR-007 (migrate_team_wellness.py) OR decision at 75% milestone (6/8 scripts complete)
